source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
The clearest reference to the crime designated by this modern expression is found in Le 6:2-7, where the transgression is defined and the penalty set forth. Breach of covenant or contract and the removal of landmarks (De 19:14; 27:17; Pr 22:28; 23:10) may be included.

�
